overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an ancient Greek temple complex at night. The player character, holding a torch, explores torch-lit interior corridors and a ceremonial courtyard with a large bonfire before exiting to a populated exterior plaza. The scene features classical marble architecture with columns, pediments, and detailed battle murals.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit exterior plaza with a large marble statue to the left. The character approaches a classical Greek temple, ascending the stone steps toward the columned portico while holding a torch that illuminates the path.

detailed frescoes depicting battle scenes covering the walls
detailed frescoes depicting battle scenes covering the walls

stone seating along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the character walks through a long corridor flanked by towering marble columns. The walls are covered with elaborate battle murals illuminated by wall-mounted braziers and the character's torch, creating a warm flickering light against the cool stone.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred courtyard with central ceremonial bonfire

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open-air courtyard
beginning to circle the large central bonfire

agents.ego_description: circling the large ceremonial bonfire in the temple courtyard, observing the flames and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: large burning pyre of logs in a bronze fire pit sending flames and smoke into the night sky
peristyle columns surrounding the courtyard perimeter
peristyle columns surrounding the courtyard perimeter
rocky hillside visible behind the courtyard against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open courtyard dominated by a massive ceremonial bonfire blazing in a bronze brazier. The space is surrounded by colonnades with mountains visible in the background. The character walks around the fire, with the flames casting dynamic shadows across the stone pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: return through temple corridor to exterior

events.description: re-entering the columned corridor from the courtyard
exiting the temple into the populated exterior plaza

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor and exiting the temple into an exterior plaza where other people are gathered

entered.detail: open stone-paved area with scattered groups of people
hanging garlands and decorations strung across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character returns through the columned corridor, passing the murals once more before exiting the temple into a populated exterior plaza. Other robed figures are visible standing near decorative banners, and the scene transitions from the enclosed torch-lit interior back to the open night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a moonlit exterior plaza, through the flickering depths of a temple, and back out into a populated night square. It begins with the character ascending stone steps toward a columned portico, guided by the warm glow of a handheld torch against the cool moonlight. As the camera moves inside, the open air gives way to a long corridor where towering marble columns and elaborate battle murals are illuminated by wall-mounted braziers. The scene then opens into a wide courtyard dominated by a massive ceremonial bonfire that casts dynamic shadows across the stone pavement against a backdrop of distant mountains. Finally, the camera retreats back through the mural-lined corridor before emerging once more into the open night air of a plaza filled with robed figures and decorative banners.
